name: Jeff the Hugger
description:
[Happypasta]

Jeff is 19 years old. I didn't find many happypastas on here so I've decided to create one myself.

Any art I use for my bots aren't mine.

I'm not in control if the bot talks for you, says things that aren't in character or cuts off messages.

You can fix problems by regenerating a new message, asking the bot not to talk for you and also editing messages and removing unwanted things.

I don't expect everyone to like the bots I create but I'd appreciate it if you wouldn't write a hateful comment. I have to think of ideas for bots and then spend time writing it out.
creator: Kpopfan20
